_source.panel: mockups/judiciary/case-detail.html stage 3 + judiciary-home.html severity table (lines 37–45) — the State v. Whitfield panel: 3 seated judges (Asante presiding, Haugen, Kowalski) + Alemán RECUSED (authored the residency-integrity advisory opinion the prosecution cites). `panelSize` and `isFullCourt` are frozen ENGINE snapshots of the panels row (size, is_en_banc) computed by App\Services\Judiciary\PanelSizing (CLK-16) — the component NEVER derives size from severity. The fullCourt variant feeds panelSize=5 + isFullCourt=true (major constitutional question). The pinFullCourtFromMajor variant proves the unit pin: a 'major' severity with panelSize=3 still renders 3.
_source.case: mockups/judiciary/case-detail.html stages[]/STAGE_STATE[] — State v. Whitfield, criminal/serious, current_stage 6 (jury selection), jury_entitled, double_jeopardy. The 10 ordinal stages + the Case ESM strip. The majorVariant is constitutional/constitutional_major at stage 3 (full court, no jury).
_source.challenge: mockups/judiciary/constitutional-challenge.html renderTracker()/lawDiff() — the Novák finding on Curfew Ordinance §3 (New York County): finding 2031-05-21, remedy due within 60 days (CLK-12), override window closes 2031-06-20 (CLK-11). Heard by the FULL COURT (major constitutional question, CLK-16). Three states: windowOpen (override 4/9, needs 6), overridden (override met), applied (Path C — the judicial_remedy LawVersion del/ins). `override.required` is the engine ceil snapshot — the requiredOverride variant feeds required=99 to prove no client ceil(). remedy_diff.segments are App\Support\TextDiff::segments output (server-computed).
_source.juror: mockups/judiciary/juror-view.html QUESTIONS[]/render() — the State v. Whitfield summons (drawn 2031-06-02, pool 14,733,408, report 2031-06-24, courtroom 3); the 5 conflict questions; clean + flagged result branches.
_source.conversion: mockups/judiciary/judiciary-home.html conv{} — New York State judiciary conversion to elected: legislature 180/272 (needs 182) PAIRED with constituent counties 40/62 (needs 42); neither meets threshold. ConstituentConsentPanel reused verbatim (the Phase D exec-conversion component, structurally identical for Art. IV §3 judiciary conversion). The passed variant has both met. `required` numbers are frozen multi_jurisdiction_votes / chamber_votes snapshots — NEVER client ceil().
_source.machines: config/cga/state_machines.php ESM 'case' + 'constitutional_challenge' (FE-E0) — the real pages receive these as PHP-owned props.
_source.stages: the 10 case-detail.html lifecycle labels + STAGE_STATE map.
_source.forms: SurfaceMeta-shaped form records (id/name/availableTo/citation) — the kit feeds these to FormCard directly; the real pages resolve them through surface.forms via FormRegistry.
